msContents.summary:
[p]Astronomical miscellany. Written in a tiny, heavily abbreviated gothic script in two columns, 56 lines to a page. Large ornamental initial C in red and blue, with marginal decorations on fol. 1, other initials in alternate blue and red, paragraph marks and headings in red. On fol. 19v is a small pen-drawn horoscopic figure. In the upper margin of the first leaf is written 'Messahalach'. Cuttings from book-sellers' catalogues relating to Albumasar's works have been pasted inside both covers.[/p]
[p][b]Contents[/b][/p]
[p]1. ff. 1r-v Dorotheus, [i]De occultis[/i][/p]
[p]f. 1r Cum aliquis occulatvent tibi anulum ... Dixit dorotheus. Si interrogatus fueris de thesaurio ... f. 1v ... docti erant.[/p]
[p]2. ff. 1v-5v Messahala, [i]De revolutionibus annorum mundi[/i][/p]
[p]f. 1v Custodiat te deus et augeat ... f. 5v ... finit liber Messahallah. Revolutionis annorum mundi de dictione illius. In nomine domini ... misericordis.[/p]
[p]3. ff. 5v-11v Albumasar, [i]De floribus[/i][/p]
[p]f. 5v Hic est liber quem collegit albumasar de floribus ... f. 11v ... septentrionalis significat.[/p]
[p]4. ff. 11v-21r Albumasar, [i]Liber experimentorum[/i][/p]
[p]f. 11v In nomine dei misericordis et pii. Tractatus in revolutione annorum mundi dixit Albumasar. Scito horam introitus solis ... f. 21r ... deus voluerit. Incipit [sic] liber albumasar experimentorum ... et pii.[/p]
[p]5. ff. 21r-26v Albumasar, [i]De revolutione annorum et de revolutione nativitatum[/i][/p]
[p]f. 21r De revolutione nativitatum exerpte. Omne tempus breve est operandi ... f. 26v ... eiusdem abimasar et cetera.[/p]

msItem.title: Astronomical miscellany
msItem.filiation: The titles of the works of Albumasar, as given above, are based on Thorndike's [i]Catalogue of Incipits[/i] and [i]History of Magic and Experimental Science[/i], Vol. 1, pp. 649-651.

objectDesc.supportDesc: 1 volume26 ff. + ii. 4to. 21 x 15 1/2 cm. On vellum: 18th cent. crimson velvet binding over the original boards. Margins cropped, and the first leaf slightly rubbed.

binding.p: 26 ff. + ii. 4to. 21 x 15 1/2 cm. On vellum: 18th cent. crimson velvet binding over the original boards. Margins cropped, and the first leaf slightly rubbed.

bibl.title: Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library
bibl.author: S. A. J. Moorat
bibl.publisher: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine

custodialHist.custEvent: Catalogue description modified in 2014. For original description, see S.A.J. Moorat, [i]Catalogue of Western Manuscripts on Medicine and Science in the Wellcome Historical Medical Library[/i] (London: Wellcome Institute for the History of Medicine, 1962-1973).

revisionDesc.change: Transformed Calm xml export to TEI xml file using a transformation scenario
Manual edits following automated Calm-TEI transformation
